author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Plan: standalone ~/ferrotorch-gpt2 crate with GPT-2 124M. Files: model.rs (GPT2Config, MLP, GPT2Block, GPT2Model with derive(Module)), tokenizer.rs (wrap HF tokenizers crate), data.rs (TextDataset impl), generate.rs (autoregressive sampling with top-k/top-p), main.rs (CLI for train/generate). Will use path dep to ../ferrotorch/ferrotorch. Need to verify exact API signatures from ferrotorch source before writing.
